mapper.select: select c.room_id, c.room_name, c.building_id, tb.building_name, tb.building_location, c.room_floor, c.available_seat, count(distinct ss.seat_id) seat_count, count(distinct case when sr.status in ('待签到','已签到') then sr.reservation_id end) active_reservation_count from reservation_demo.classroom c join reservation_demo.t_building tb on c.building_id = tb.building_id left join reservation_demo.smart_seat ss on ss.room_id = c.room_id and ss.building_id = c.building_id left join reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation sr on sr.room_id = c.room_id and sr.building_id = c.building_id and sr.reservation_date = curdate() group by c.room_id, c.room_name, c.building_id, tb.building_name, tb.building_location, c.room_floor, c.available_seat order by c.building_id, c.room_floor, c.room_id

select c.room_id, c.room_name, c.building_id, tb.building_name, tb.building_location, c.room_floor, c.available_seat from reservation_demo.classroom c join reservation_demo.t_building tb on c.building_id = tb.building_id where c.room_id = #{room_id} limit 1

select ss.seat_id, ss.room_id, ss.building_id, ss.seat_no, ss.row_index, ss.col_index, ss.tags, ss.status, ss.assigned_major, c.room_name, tb.building_name, '0' occupied from reservation_demo.smart_seat ss join reservation_demo.classroom c on ss.room_id = c.room_id and ss.building_id = c.building_id join reservation_demo.t_building tb on c.building_id = tb.building_id where ss.seat_id = #{seat_id} limit 1
select * from reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation where reservation_id = #{reservation_id} limit 1

select r.*, s.s_name from reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation r join reservation_demo.student s on s.s_id = r.s_id where r.s_id = #{s_id} order by r.reservation_date desc, r.start_time desc, r.created_at desc

select r.*, s.s_name from reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation r join reservation_demo.student s on s.s_id = r.s_id where 1 = 1
and (r.s_id = #{s_id} or s.s_name like concat('%', #{s_id}, '%'))
and r.status = #{status}
order by r.reservation_date desc, r.start_time desc, r.created_at desc
select count(1) from reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation where reservation_date = curdate() and status in ('待签到','已签到')
select count(1) from reservation_demo.classroom where room_id in (select room_id from reservation_demo.smart_seat group by room_id)
select count(1) from reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation where room_id = #{room_id} and status in ('待签到','已签到')
select count(1) from reservation_demo.smart_seat where room_id = #{room_id} and status = 'active'
mapper.insert: insert into reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation(reservation_id, s_id, seat_id, seat_no, room_id, room_name, building_id, building_name, reservation_date, start_time, end_time, status, checkin_code, checkin_time, created_at) values (#{reservation_id}, #{s_id}, #{seat_id}, #{seat_no}, #{room_id}, #{room_name}, #{building_id}, #{building_name}, #{reservation_date}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{status}, #{checkin_code}, #{checkin_time}, #{created_at})

insert into reservation_demo.smart_violation(violation_id, reservation_id, s_id, s_name, score_change, reason, created_at) values (#{violation_id}, #{reservation_id}, #{s_id}, #{s_name}, #{score_change}, #{reason}, #{created_at})
mapper.select: select * from reservation_demo.smart_violation order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into reservation_demo.smart_seat(seat_id, room_id, building_id, seat_no, row_index, col_index, tags, status, assigned_major) values (#{seat_id}, #{room_id}, #{building_id}, #{seat_no}, #{row_index}, #{col_index}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{assigned_major})
mapper.update: update reservation_demo.smart_seat set status = #{status} where seat_id = #{seat_id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation where room_id = #{room_id} and reservation_date = #{reservation_date} and status in ('待签到','已签到')
select count(1) from reservation_demo.smart_seat_reservation where reservation_date = #{reservation_date} and status in ('待签到','已签到')
